name_en: The new GG Marmont series is renowned for its signature quilted leather and interlocking GG accessories. On this small shoulder bag, classic materials are combined with vertical and diagonal patterns to create a unique geometric design ✨Model: 443497Dimensions: W26*H15*D7cm
